Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets work on case identification Lets look at the log first The user is working on different documents emails right Lets list out all the windows documents they interact with 1 Document1 docx 2 Email Inbox 3 Report Draft pdf 4 Budget 2024 xlsx 5 Quarterly Report docx

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Document1 docx events are 090000 focus 090030 typing 090100 typing 090115 save 090615 typing 090630 save 090700 close That makes sense because they left it open did other stuff came back then closed it Good Thats a single case Editing Document1 docx

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then the email the window is Email Inbox but the action is Open Email about Annual Meeting then reply type send Thats a separate case Handling Annual Meeting Email Because thats a distinct work unit responding to that specific email

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Wait but the Acrobat part Report Draft pdf They scroll highlight Key Findings then immediately switch to Excel So thats a separate case Or is that part of another case

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Is the Report Draft part of the Quarterly Report case Because the Quarterly Report is the final report so reviewing the draft would be part of working on the quarterly report

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets list all distinct windows artifacts with their events Quarterly Report docx Document1 docx Email Inbox Annual Meeting email Report Draft pdf Budget 2024 xlsx

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If we take each distinct artifact document email spreadsheet PDF as a case thats straightforward

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Document1 docx Open Document1 docx Add content Draft intro paragraph Add content Additional details here Save Document1 docx Add content Inserting reference to budget Save Document1 docx Close Document1 docx

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Annual Meeting Email Open Annual Meeting Email Scroll through Email Start Reply to Email Compose Reply Meeting details confirmed Send Email Reply

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Report Draft pdf Open Report Draft pdf Scroll through Report Draft Highlight Key Findings in Report Draft

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 4 Budget 2024 xlsx Open Budget 2024 xlsx Update Q1 budget figures Add Q2 budget row Save Budget 2024 xlsx

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 5 Quarterly Report docx Open Quarterly Report docx Return to Quarterly Report docx Draft Executive Summary Save Quarterly Report docx Close Quarterly Report docx

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets map the raw actions to standardized activities Focus on a window is opening or switching back Typing depends on context Save is Save artifact Click depends on the action Scroll is Scroll through artifact Highlight is Highlight text in artifact Close is Close artifact

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets check if all events are accounted for

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I missed the Switch events earlier The Switch from Document1 to Chrome is the user leaving Document1 to go to the email The Switch from Email to PDF is the transition to Report Draft pdf The Switch from PDF to Excel is the transition to Budget 2024 xlsx The Switch from Excel back to Document1 is the return to Document1

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Oh no I missed this event earlier The Switch from Document1 to Chrome Where does that go

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: The Switch event should be part of the Document1 case Or is it part of the email case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets decide assign Switch events to the case of the window they are leaving which makes sense as it is the end of that tasks session

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now all Switch events are assigned to the case of the window they are leaving which makes sense as its the end of that tasks session

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait a Switch event can only belong to one case Thats a problem

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternative approach instead of assigning Switch events to either case we can represent the Switch as an activity in the case that is being entered

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since this is a single users log the cases are different tasks done sequentially with interruptions and resumptions such as Document1 being paused then resumed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Document1 case includes open draft add details save pause editing to handle email add content save close The gap is explained by the other cases email PDF Excel that happen in between

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets confirm all original events are mapped

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Oh right I missed this Switch event too The Switch from Email to PDF should be considered in the email and PDF interpretation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Maybe assign Switch events to the case that is being entered using the Switch event timestamp and target window info
